---
name: Feature request
about: A capability you need that is missing from the library
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
A clear description of the gap or limitation you're hitting.

**How do you currently work around it?**
If you have a workaround, describe it here.

**What would you want the solution to look like?**
Describe the behaviour or output you'd expect. If it involves a new notebook, describe what it would do and what parameters it would take.

**Which medallion layer(s) does this apply to?**
- [ ] Bronze
- [ ] Silver
- [ ] Gold
- [ ] All layers

**Additional context**
Anything else that might be relevant — Fabric Runtime version, Lakehouse configuration, workload type, etc.
